description: Represents a CloudFormation resource scan that discovers existing AWS resources in an account and region.

ResourceScanId.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the resource scan.
ResourceScanId.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the resource scan.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ScanId.description: The unique identifier portion of the resource scan ARN.
ScanId.markdownDescription:
The unique identifier portion of the resource scan ARN.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Status.markdownDescription:
Status of the resource scan.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: IN_PROGRESS | FAILED | COMPLETE | EXPIRED  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

StartTime.description: The time that the resource scan was started.
StartTime.markdownDescription:
The time that the resource scan was started.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

PercentageCompleted.description: The percentage of the resource scan that has been completed.

The percentage of the resource scan that has been completed.

---

Required: No  
Type: Number  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
